name: example-portfolio-cosmic
title: Portfolio Cosmic — Dark Landing

title_i18n.zh-CN: Portfolio Cosmic — 暗色个人作品集落地页
title_i18n.zh-TW: Portfolio Cosmic — 暗色作品集著陸頁
title_i18n.ja: Portfolio Cosmic — ダークなランディングページ
title_i18n.fr: Portfolio Cosmic — Page de destination sombre
title_i18n.es: Portfolio Cosmic — Página de destino oscura
title_i18n.vi: Portfolio Cosmic — Trang đích tối màu

description: Premium dark single-page portfolio landing: cinematic HLS hero video, Instrument-Serif italic display type, a 000→100 loading counter, an alternating bento works grid, a scroll-pinned parallax exploration gallery, and a marquee contact footer with the locked #89AACC→#4E85BF accent gradient.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 高端暗色单页作品集落地页：电影感 HLS 视频首屏、Instrument Serif 斜体标题、000→100 加载计数器、错位 bento 作品网格、滚动钉住的视差探索画廊，以及带 #89AACC→#4E85BF 渐变强调色的跑马灯联系页脚。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 高端暗色單頁作品集著陸頁：電影感 HLS 影片首屏、Instrument Serif 斜體標題、000→100 載入計數器、錯位 bento 作品網格、捲動釘住的視差探索畫廊，以及帶 #89AACC→#4E85BF 漸層強調色的跑馬燈聯絡頁尾。
description_i18n.ja: プレミアムなダークのシングルページ・ポートフォリオ LP：シネマティックな HLS ヒーロー動画、Instrument Serif のイタリック表示書体、000→100 のローディングカウンター、交互配置の bento 作品グリッド、スクロールで固定されるパララックスの探求ギャラリー、そして固定された #89AACC→#4E85BF のアクセントグラデーションを使ったマーキーのコンタクトフッター。
description_i18n.ko: 프리미엄 다크 싱글 페이지 포트폴리오 랜딩: 영화 같은 HLS 히어로 영상, Instrument Serif 이탤릭 디스플레이 서체, 000→100 로딩 카운터, 교차 배치된 벤토 작품 그리드, 스크롤로 고정되는 패럴랙스 탐험 갤러리, 그리고 고정된 #89AACC→#4E85BF 강조 그라데이션을 적용한 마키 연락처 푸터.
description_i18n.de: Hochwertige dunkle Single-Page-Portfolio-Landingpage: cineastisches HLS-Hero-Video, kursive Instrument-Serif-Display-Schrift, ein Ladezähler von 000 bis 100, ein abwechselndes Bento-Werkraster, eine beim Scrollen fixierte Parallax-Erkundungsgalerie und ein Marquee-Kontakt-Footer mit dem festgelegten Akzentverlauf #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.fr: Page de destination de portfolio sombre et premium en une seule page : vidéo hero HLS cinématographique, typographie d'affichage italique Instrument Serif, un compteur de chargement de 000 à 100, une grille de réalisations bento en alternance, une galerie d'exploration en parallaxe épinglée au défilement, et un pied de page de contact en marquee avec le dégradé d'accent verrouillé #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.ru: Премиальная тёмная одностраничная посадочная страница портфолио: кинематографичное HLS-видео в герое, наклонный дисплейный шрифт Instrument Serif, счётчик загрузки от 000 до 100, чередующаяся сетка работ в стиле bento, закреплённая при прокрутке параллакс-галерея исследований и контактный футер-бегущая строка с зафиксированным акцентным градиентом #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.es: Página de destino de portafolio oscura y premium de una sola página: vídeo hero HLS cinematográfico, tipografía de display en cursiva Instrument Serif, un contador de carga de 000 a 100, una cuadrícula bento de trabajos alterna, una galería de exploración con parallax fijada al hacer scroll y un pie de página de contacto tipo marquee con el degradado de acento bloqueado #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Landing page de portfólio escura e premium em página única: vídeo hero HLS cinematográfico, tipografia de display em itálico Instrument Serif, um contador de carregamento de 000 a 100, uma grade bento de trabalhos alternada, uma galeria de exploração com parallax fixada na rolagem e um rodapé de contato em marquee com o gradiente de destaque travado #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.it: Landing page di portfolio scura e premium a pagina singola: video hero HLS cinematografico, font display in corsivo Instrument Serif, un contatore di caricamento da 000 a 100, una griglia bento di lavori alternata, una galleria di esplorazione in parallasse ancorata allo scroll e un footer di contatto in marquee con il gradiente d'accento bloccato #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.vi: Trang đích portfolio tối màu, cao cấp dạng một trang: video hero HLS điện ảnh, kiểu chữ hiển thị in nghiêng Instrument Serif, bộ đếm tải từ 000 đến 100, lưới tác phẩm bento xen kẽ, thư viện khám phá parallax ghim theo cuộn, cùng footer liên hệ dạng marquee với gradient nhấn cố định #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.pl: Premium ciemna jednostronicowa strona docelowa portfolio: filmowy hero w technologii HLS, kursywny krój wyświetlania Instrument Serif, licznik ładowania od 000 do 100, naprzemienna siatka prac bento, przypięta podczas przewijania galeria eksploracji z paralaksą oraz kontaktowa stopka typu marquee z zablokowanym gradientem akcentu #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.id: Halaman arahan portofolio gelap dan premium satu halaman: video hero HLS sinematik, tipografi display miring Instrument Serif, penghitung pemuatan 000 hingga 100, kisi karya bento bergantian, galeri eksplorasi parallax yang terkunci saat di-scroll, dan footer kontak marquee dengan gradien aksen terkunci #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.nl: Premium donkere single-page portfolio-landingspagina: cinematische HLS-herovideo, cursief Instrument-Serif-displaylettertype, een laadteller van 000 tot 100, een afwisselend bento-werkraster, een bij het scrollen vastgezette parallax-verkenningsgalerij en een marquee-contactfooter met het vastgelegde accentverloop #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.ar: صفحة هبوط لمعرض أعمال داكنة وفاخرة من صفحة واحدة: فيديو بطل HLS سينمائي، وخط عرض مائل Instrument Serif، وعدّاد تحميل من 000 إلى 100، وشبكة أعمال bento متناوبة، ومعرض استكشاف بتأثير parallax مثبّت أثناء التمرير، وتذييل تواصل بشريط متحرك بتدرّج لوني مميّز ثابت #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.tr: Premium koyu tek sayfalık portföy açılış sayfası: sinematik HLS hero videosu, italik Instrument Serif görüntü yazı tipi, 000'dan 100'e bir yükleme sayacı, dönüşümlü bento iş ızgarası, kaydırmada sabitlenen paralaks keşif galerisi ve sabitlenmiş #89AACC→#4E85BF vurgu gradyanlı marquee iletişim altbilgisi.
description_i18n.uk: Преміальна темна односторінкова посадкова сторінка портфоліо: кінематографічне HLS-відео в герої, курсивний дисплейний шрифт Instrument Serif, лічильник завантаження від 000 до 100, чергована сітка робіт у стилі bento, закріплена під час прокрутки паралакс-галерея досліджень і контактний футер-біжучий рядок із зафіксованим акцентним градієнтом #89AACC→#4E85BF.
description_i18n.en: Premium dark single-page portfolio landing: cinematic HLS hero video, Instrument-Serif italic display type, a 000→100 loading counter, an alternating bento works grid, a scroll-pinned parallax exploration gallery, and a marquee contact footer with the locked #89AACC→#4E85BF accent gradient.

query.en:
Prompt to recreate this landing page:

Build a single-page dark portfolio landing page using React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + TypeScript + GSAP + Framer Motion + hls.js.

---

## Global Design System

## Fonts

Google Fonts import: Inter (300–700) and Instrument Serif (italic, 400).
- --font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif → Tailwind font-body
- --font-display: 'Instrument Serif', serif → Tailwind font-display

## CSS Custom Properties (HSL, no hsl() wrapper — Tailwind adds it)

--bg: 0 0% 4%;
--surface: 0 0% 8%;
--text: 0 0% 96%;
--muted: 0 0% 53%;
--stroke: 0 0% 12%;
--accent: 0 0% 96%;

## Tailwind Custom Colors

bg: "hsl(var(--bg))",
surface: "hsl(var(--surface))",
"text-primary": "hsl(var(--text))",
muted: "hsl(var(--muted))",
stroke: "hsl(var(--stroke))",

## Accent Gradient

linear-gradient(90deg, #89AACC 0%, #4E85BF 100%) — used on logo ring, hover borders, progress bars. CSS utility class .accent-gradient.

## Custom Animations (in index.css)

- @keyframes scroll-down — translateY(-100%) → translateY(200%), 1.5s ease-in-out infinite
- @keyframes role-fade-in — opacity 0 + translateY(8px) → opacity 1 + translateY(0), 0.4s ease-out
- @keyframes gradient-shift — background-position 0% 50% → 100% 50% → 0% 50%, 6s ease infinite (for animated gradient borders)

## Forced dark theme — no light mode toggle. body gets bg-bg text-text-primary.

---

## Page Structure (Index.tsx)

{isLoading && <LoadingScreen onComplete={() => setIsLoading(false)} />}

---

## Section 1: Loading Screen

Full-screen overlay (fixed inset-0 z-[9999] bg-bg). Uses requestAnimationFrame counter from 000→100 over 2700ms.

- Top-left: "Portfolio" label — text-xs text-muted uppercase tracking-[0.3em]. Animates y:-20→0, opacity 0→1.
- Center: Rotating words ["Design", "Create", "Inspire"] cycling every 900ms. AnimatePresence mode="wait" with y:20→0→-20 transitions. text-4xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-display italic text-text-primary/80.
- Bottom-right: Counter display — text-6xl md:text-8xl lg:text-9xl font-display text-text-primary tabular-nums. Shows String(count).padStart(3, "0").
- Bottom progress bar: h-[3px] bg-stroke/50, inner div with .accent-gradient, scaleX(count/100) transform, box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(137, 170, 204, 0.35).
- On complete (count reaches 100): 400ms delay then calls onComplete.

---

## Section 2: Hero

Full-viewport section with background HLS video and centered content.

## Background Video

- HLS source: https://stream.mux.com/Aa02T7oM1wH5Mk5EEVDYhbZ1ChcdhRsS2m1NYyx4Ua1g.m3u8
- Uses hls.js — if Hls.isSupported(), create HLS instance; else if native HLS support, set video.src directly.
- Video: autoPlay muted loop playsInline, absolutely positioned and centered with min-w-full min-h-full object-cover -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2.
- Dark overlay: bg-black/20
- Bottom fade: h-48 bg-gradient-to-t from-bg to-transparent

## Navbar (fixed, floats at top center)

fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 flex justify-center pt-4 md:pt-6 px-4.

Inner pill: inline-flex items-center rounded-full backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 bg-surface px-2 py-2. Gets shadow-md shadow-black/10 when scrollY > 100.

Contents (left to right):
- Logo: 9×9 circle with accent gradient border (reverses direction on hover). Inner bg-bg circle with "JA" in font-display italic text-[13px]. Scales 110% on hover.
- Divider: w-px h-5 bg-stroke mx-1 (hidden on mobile)
- Nav links: ["Home", "Work", "Resume"] — text-xs sm:text-sm rounded-full px-3 sm:px-4 py-1.5 sm:py-2. Active: text-text-primary bg-stroke/50. Inactive: text-muted hover:text-text-primary hover:bg-stroke/50.
- Divider
- "Say hi" button: Same size as nav links. On hover, shows accent gradient border behind (using absolute span with inset: -2px). Inner content wrapped in bg-surface rounded-full backdrop-blur-md. Includes "↗" arrow.

## Hero Content (centered, z-10)

- Eyebrow: text-xs text-muted uppercase tracking-[0.3em] mb-8 — "COLLECTION '26". Class blur-in.
- Name: text-6xl md:text-8xl lg:text-9xl font-display italic leading-[0.9] tracking-tight text-text-primary mb-6 — "Michael Smith". Class name-reveal.
- Role line: "A {role} lives in Chicago." — roles cycle every 2s through ["Creative", "Fullstack", "Founder", "Scholar"]. Role word uses font-display italic text-text-primary animate-role-fade-in inline-block with key={roleIndex} for re-triggering animation.
- Description: text-sm md:text-base text-muted max-w-md mb-12 — "Designing seamless digital interactions by focusing on the unique nuances which bring systems to life."
- CTA Buttons (inline-flex gap-4):
- "See Works": Solid button. Default: bg-text-primary text-bg. Hover: bg-bg text-text-primary with accent gradient border ring.
- "Reach out...": Outlined button. Default: border-2 border-stroke bg-bg text-text-primary. Hover: border-transparent with accent gradient border ring.
- Both: rounded-full text-sm px-7 py-3.5 hover:scale-105.

## GSAP Entrance

Timeline with ease: "power3.out":
- .name-reveal: opacity 0→1, y 50→0, duration 1.2s, delay 0.1s
- .blur-in: opacity 0→1, filter blur(10px)→blur(0px), y 20→0, duration 1s, stagger 0.1, delay 0.3s

## Scroll Indicator

Bottom-center, text-xs text-muted uppercase tracking-[0.2em] "SCROLL" label above a w-px h-10 bg-stroke line with animated highlight using .animate-scroll-down.

---

## Section 3: Selected Works

bg-bg py-12 md:py-16. Inner: max-w-[1200px] mx-auto px-6 md:px-10 lg:px-16.

## Header

Framer Motion whileInView — opacity 0→1, y 30→0, duration 1s, ease [0.25,0.1,0.25,1], viewport once margin "-100px".
- Eyebrow: w-8 h-px bg-stroke + "Selected Work" text-xs text-muted uppercase tracking-[0.3em]
- Heading: "Featured *projects*" — italic word in font-display italic
- Subtext: "A selection of projects I've worked on, from concept to launch."
- "View all work" button (desktop only, hidden md:inline-flex) — rounded-full with gradient hover border ring + right arrow

## Bento Grid

grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-5 md:gap-6. Column spans alternate: 7/5/5/7.

4 project cards with titles: Automotive Motion, Urban Architecture, Human Perspective, Brand Identity.

Each card: bg-surface border border-stroke rounded-3xl with aspect ratios. Contains:
- Background image with object-cover group-hover:scale-105
- Halftone overlay: radial-gradient(circle, #000 1px, transparent 1px) at 4×4px, opacity-20 mix-blend-multiply
- Hover: bg-bg/70 opacity-0→1 + backdrop-blur-lg
- Hover label: pill with animated gradient border, white bg, "View — *Title*" (title in font-display italic)

---

## Section 4: Journal

bg-bg py-16 md:py-24. Same header pattern (eyebrow + "Recent *thoughts*" + subtext + "View all" button).

4 journal entries displayed as horizontal pills (rounded-[40px] sm:rounded-full) with titles, images, read times, and dates.

Each entry: flex items-center gap-6 p-4 bg-surface/30 hover:bg-surface border border-stroke.

---

## Section 5: Explorations (Parallax Gallery)

min-h-[300vh] section for scroll-driven parallax.

## Layer 1: Pinned Center (z-10)

h-screen div pinned with GSAP ScrollTrigger.create({ pin: contentRef, pinSpacing: false }).
- Eyebrow: "Explorations"
- Heading: "Visual *playground*"
- Subtext + Dribbble button

## Layer 2: Parallax Columns (z-20, absolute)

grid grid-cols-2 gap-12 md:gap-40 inside max-w-[1400px].

6 items split into 2 columns with GSAP scroll-driven parallax movement.
Cards: aspect-square max-w-[320px], with rotation and lightbox on click.

---

## Section 6: Stats

bg-bg py-16 md:py-24. 3-column grid with stats: 20+ Years Experience, 95+ Projects Done, 200% Satisfied Clients.

---

## Section 7: Contact / Footer

bg-bg pt-16 md:pt-20 pb-8 md:pb-12 overflow-hidden.

## Background Video

Same HLS source as hero, but flipped vertically (scale-y-[-1]). Heavier overlay: bg-black/60.

## GSAP Marquee

"BUILDING THE FUTURE • " repeated 10×. GSAP xPercent: -50, duration 40, ease "none", repeat -1.

## CTA

Email button: mailto:hello@michaelsmith.com with gradient hover border ring.

## Footer Bar

Social links [Twitter, LinkedIn, Dribbble, GitHub] + Green pulsing dot + "Available for projects"

---

## Dependencies

gsap, framer-motion, hls.js, react-router-dom, tailwindcss-animate

Add smooth scroll nav and page transitions.
query.zh-CN: 构建 Portfolio Cosmic 暗色单页作品集落地页；完整规格见 en 字段（逐字注入）。
